headline: NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) Falls With Chip Selloff, Is It Still 8% Undervalued?
summary: NXP Semiconductors (NXPI) shares recently declined alongside a wider chip sector selloff, as investors took profits after a strong rally and reassessed AI related spending following SK Hynix’s reduced earnings forecast. See our latest analysis for NXP Semiconductors. The recent pullback in NXP Semiconductors’ share price, including a 1-day share price return of down 1.71% and a 30-day share price return of down 11.67%, comes after a strong run. The 90-day share price return is up 30.54% and...
